name: il2korea_dynamic_campaign
description: IL-2 Korea scenario generator and cooperative mission packager

scripts.test: node -e "const { buildOptions, buildScenario } = require('./src/generator'); const options = buildOptions(); if (!options.aircraft.length) throw new Error('No aircraft options'); const scenario = buildScenario({ aircraft: options.aircraft[0], targetType: options.targetTypes[0], landscape: options.landscapes[0], enemyFaction: 'Any', weather: 'Clear' }, { exportToGame: false }); console.log(scenario.outputPath);"
scripts.test:scratch: node -e "process.env.IL2_KOREA_SCRATCH_BUILDER='1'; const { buildScenario } = require('./src/generator'); const result = buildScenario({ aircraft: 'il10', targetType: 'Bridge Strike', landscape: 'LANDSCAPE_Korea_au', enemyFaction: 'UN/US-aligned', weather: 'Clear', startTime: '12:00:0', startAirfield: 'auto', coopFriendly: false }, { exportToGame: false }); console.log(result.missionOutputPath);"

author: Peter G. Robbins
